name: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk
summary: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk operates retail electronics store in Indonesia. It sells LED TVs, LCDs, plasmas, computers, laptops, office supplies, mobile phones, various gadgets, speakers, home theaters, digital cameras, kitchen electronic equipment, and household furniture. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia.
